summary: MatchUp V4 iteration 4 testing (formerly PitchFinder). Backend V4 pytest: 9/10 pass, 1 skipped, 1 FAIL — self-match-rating spec deviation. All 4 targeted frontend flows PASS on 390x844 mobile viewport. Backend covered: auth login, friends full flow (request→accept→status friends both ways→delete), polls (create in group, vote, idempotent re-vote, second user vote tallied, invalid option 400), match ratings (POST + GET /matches/{id}/ratings/mine verifies stored level=4/punct=5/fp=5), leave group as member (Leo left FC République/other → membership removed), leave-as-admin destructive test SKIPPED to preserve seed (see rca), OTP request+verify with 000000 in dev, invalid-target 400, wrong-code 400, change password + revert (verified new pw login works then reverted to demo1234). Self-rating: POST /matches/{id}/ratings with {demo_id:{level,punct,fp}} returns 201 but server silently skips storing (server.py L1254 `if rated_id == user['id']: continue`). Spec required 400. Frontend flows (via Playwright): A) chat input visible at y=770 after focus/type, sent message 'TEST_MSG_v4_keyboard_ok' appears in list; B) group-menu-button opens sheet with menu-share+menu-leave+menu-rate+menu-report visible AND menu-block hidden — correctly because demo is ADMIN of Les Titans (matches spec fallback 'may be 4 for admin'); tapping menu-share opens ShareModal with light link card and 'Copier' button; C) first member card in Les Titans (Alex Martin id 7fb44147-...) navigates to /profile/{id}, public-profile-screen renders (no crash, shows Alex Martin, MID, Intermédiaire, 42 matchs, réputation 850); D) /map renders map-screen with 8 map-pin-* and 8 map-list-* items, tapping first list item navigates to group-detail-screen.

minor.issue: Self-rating is silently skipped (server.py:1253-1255 uses `continue`) and returns 201. Spec requires HTTP 400. Data integrity is preserved (self rating never stored), but API contract is misleading.

Endpoint allows an admin to leave without checking role and without transferring admin rights (server.py:769-772 just deletes group_members row). Not covered by pytest to avoid corrupting seed data. Consider blocking with 400 or auto-transferring admin to oldest member.
No explicit rejection when to_user_id == self. Behavior not tested but worth a self-friend guard similar to self-report guard.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warns: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Migrate any React Native components passing pointerEvents as a prop to use style.pointerEvents instead. Repro: appears on nearly every page load in web preview console.

Console warns: '[expo-notifications] Listening to push token changes is not yet fully supported on web. Adding a listener will have no effect.' This is expected for web preview (push requires native build) but confirms push cannot be validated on web preview and needs a device build.

action_items: BACKEND: return HTTP 400 in POST /api/matches/{id}/ratings when body.ratings contains the caller's own user id (server.py:1253-1255). Currently silently skipped — misleading API contract per V4 spec.
BACKEND: guard POST /api/groups/{id}/leave when caller is admin — either 400 with clear error, or auto-transfer admin to the next-oldest member before deleting the membership (server.py:769-772).
BACKEND (nice-to-have): add self-friend-request guard in POST /api/friends/request.
FRONTEND: migrate any pointerEvents={...} prop usages to style={{pointerEvents:'...'}} to silence deprecation warnings on web.
STILL OPEN FROM V2/V3 (not re-tested this iter): /api/register-push graceful-degrade when EMERGENT_PUSH_KEY=placeholder, and radius_km filter running in Python instead of Mongo query.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 1646 lines (up from 1352 in V3). Splitting into routers/ (auth, groups, matches, moderation, friends, security, push) is now urgent — single file is hard to maintain and review.

ratings/reputation aggregate pipeline runs INSIDE the per-rated_id loop (server.py:1270-1288). If a match has 10 rated players, this triggers 10 separate aggregations sequentially per POST. Consider batching or running post-loop once for all rated_ids.
friendship_key uses sorted user IDs but there is no unique index on the `key` field of db.friendships — two concurrent /friends/request calls could create duplicate rows.
vote_poll uses `$set: {f'poll.votes.{user_id}': idx}` which is safe for idempotency but there is no length cap on poll.votes (could grow unbounded for very large groups — non-issue at current scale).
OTP challenge stores plain-text code 000000 in mongo and has no TTL index — production should hash the code and add expireAfterSeconds on created_at.
change_password does not invalidate existing JWT tokens after password change (JWTs remain valid until expiry). Consider a token_version field on user to force re-login on password change.

success_rate.backend: 90% (9/10) on V4 suite — 1 spec deviation on self-rating, 1 SKIP for destructive admin-leave
success_rate.frontend: 100% of 4 targeted V4 flows (A chat keyboard, B share modal, C member→profile, D map)

seed_data_creation: test_v4_features created a poll message in the Titans group + friendship rows (cleaned up via DELETE /friends/{id} inside test). Chat also has one persistent 'TEST_MSG_v4_keyboard_ok' message from Playwright and multiple TEST_msg_* from prior iterations. Consider a dev-only cleanup endpoint to purge TEST_* messages+polls between test runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: V4 test file: /app/backend/tests/test_v4_features.py — 10 tests, structured by feature classes. Fixtures demo_ctx/sarah_ctx/leo_ctx/sample_group_id cache login and the target group. Change-password test SUCCESSFULLY reverts to demo1234 at the end — safe to re-run. Demo user is ADMIN on 'Les Titans du 11ème' as well as 'FC République' (contrary to iter3 note which said 'not just Les Titans') — verified via screenshot showing 'ADMIN' badge on Titans header. Because of this, menu-block is hidden for demo on Titans too, so the V4 spec's 'sheet has 5 items' branch requires testing with a NON-admin account (sarah/leo/tom). Frontend map screen at /map renders a web mock (grid + 8 pins) as expected — react-native-maps only works on native. Chat input on 390x844 sits at y=770, safely above tab bar / keyboard would push it further up. Public profile at /profile/{id} works — tested with member 7fb44147-3ca5-4821-873d-ac3c5d01a528 (Alex Martin himself since Alex is a member of his own group). Poll vote endpoint is idempotent by design (Mongo $set on user_id key); test asserts votes[user_id] == 0 after re-vote and both users tallied after sarah votes.
rca_of_issue:
Self-rating spec deviation RCA: /app/backend/server.py:1253-1255 loops over body.ratings.items() and uses `continue` when rated_id == caller's id. This means the request is treated as valid (returns 201) but the self entry is silently dropped. Spec 4 required a 400. Fix: add a guard at the top of rate_match:

```python
if user["id"] in body.ratings:
    raise HTTPException(400, "Cannot rate yourself")
```

Admin-leave RCA (not tested destructively): leave_group at server.py:769-772 does an unconditional `db.group_members.delete_one`. If the caller is the only admin, the group becomes admin-less. Fix options: (1) block with 400 if role==admin AND no other admin exists; (2) auto-transfer to oldest member; (3) block admin leave outright with 400. Recommend option 2 for best UX.
